name: miggo-public-mcp
description: MCP server for Miggo's public API - query services, endpoints, vulnerabilities, findings, dependencies, and third-party integrations
long_description: Connect Claude to your Miggo security environment. This extension provides 25 tools to explore and analyze your application security posture including services, endpoints, vulnerabilities, findings, dependencies, and third-party integrations. Use natural language to assess risk, investigate threats, onboard security teams, and prioritize remediation across your entire environment.

tools.name: services_search
tools.description: Search for services in your Miggo environment

tools.name: services_get
tools.description: Fetch a single service by ID

tools.name: services_count
tools.description: Count services matching filters

tools.name: services_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for service filters

tools.name: endpoints_search
tools.description: Search for endpoints in your Miggo environment

tools.name: endpoints_get
tools.description: Fetch a single endpoint by ID

tools.name: endpoints_count
tools.description: Count endpoints matching filters

tools.name: endpoints_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for endpoint filters

tools.name: third_parties_search
tools.description: Search for third-party integrations

tools.name: third_parties_get
tools.description: Fetch a single third-party by ID

tools.name: third_parties_count
tools.description: Count third-parties matching filters

tools.name: third_parties_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for third-party filters

tools.name: findings_search
tools.description: Search security findings (posture, drift, incidents)

tools.name: findings_get
tools.description: Fetch a single finding by ID

tools.name: findings_count
tools.description: Count findings matching filters

tools.name: findings_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for finding filters

tools.name: vulnerabilities_search
tools.description: Search known vulnerabilities across services

tools.name: vulnerabilities_get
tools.description: Fetch a single vulnerability by ID

tools.name: vulnerabilities_count
tools.description: Count vulnerabilities matching filters

tools.name: vulnerabilities_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for vulnerability filters

tools.name: dependencies_search
tools.description: Search software dependencies across services

tools.name: dependencies_get
tools.description: Fetch a single dependency by ID

tools.name: dependencies_count
tools.description: Count dependencies matching filters

tools.name: dependencies_facets
tools.description: Get possible field values for dependency filters

tools.name: project_get
tools.description: Get metadata for the authenticated project
